name: French Bread Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf unsliced french bread (not sour dough)
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble the ingredients in separate containers or bags for easy access when serving.
2. Place the spaghetti sauce in a 3-cup container, the grated Parmesan cheese in one 1-quart bag, and the pepperoni slices in another quart-sized bag. Wrap the bread in heavy foil.
3. Freeze all components together until ready to serve.
4. Thaw the French Bread, sauce, Parmesan cheese, and pepperoni before serving.
5. Slice the loaf of French Bread in half lengthwise.
6. Layer the sauce, grated Parmesan cheese, pepperoni slices, mozzarella cheese, and any additional toppings on each half of the bread.
7. Preheat the oven to broil or 550 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Place each half of the bread on a baking sheet and place it in the preheated oven.
9. Broil until the mozzarella cheese is melted.
10. Cut the pizza into serving-sized pieces.
